body:
## Summary
- Assert active mock-exam questions expose localized provenance badges and source-note toggles.
- Assert submitted review cards keep the provenance/source-note affordance in Swedish and English.
- Remove the stale e2e expectation that UHR provenance is hidden before submission.

## Verification
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-exam-route-copy-parity.test.js tests/content-question-card-accessibility-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "exam|mock exam|ProvenanceBadge|provenance|source note|UHR source|source citation"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts --workers=1 --grep "provenance|source"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`
title: test(exam): cover provenance badges in mock exam flow
